visible_entities.desc: A silver butter knife with a serrated edge and a smooth, metallic handle.
A woven placemat with horizontal stripes in shades of green, orange, and brown.

atomic_facts.fact: Text overlay provides a recipe for 'Crostini Bread for Hors D'oeuvres'.
The recipe lists ingredients including a French baguette, unsalted butter, olive oil, season salt, sugar, and Italian seasoning.
The instructions state to melt butter, add oil and seasonings, brush over bread slices, and bake at 350 degrees.
Three crostini appetizers are visible on the plate, each topped with a white spread and a red piece, likely a tomato or pepper.

ocr: 1 FRENCH BAGUETTE, SLICED INTO 1/4 - 3/8 INCH SLICES
2 TABLESPOONS GRAND SELECTIONS EXTRA VIRGIN OLIVE OIL
MELT BUTTER. ADD OIL AND SEASONINGS. ADJUST SEASONINGS TO TASTE. BRUSH OVER BREAD SLICES AND BAKE AT 350 DEGREES OR UNTIL GOLDEN BROWN.
spatial: The shot is a close-up, slightly high-angle view. A rectangular plate with crostini is centered in the mid-ground. A butter knife lies horizontally in the immediate foreground, below the plate. The entire scene is set on a striped, woven placemat. Text is overlaid across the top and middle of the image.

visible_entities.desc: Blue text logo reading 'RADA CUTLERY' in a serif font
Silver knife with a metallic handle and blade
White ribbon banner with blue text
List of text items under the heading 'Gift Giving Opportunities'

atomic_facts.fact: The text 'RADA CUTLERY' is displayed in large blue letters.
A silver knife is positioned horizontally below the main logo.
The banner text reads 'American Made Cutlery'.
A list of occasions includes Birthdays, Weddings, Mother's Day, Christmas, Housewarmings, Graduations, Father's Day, and Bridal Showers.
The quote '"Rada Cutlery gifts are enjoyed for a lifetime!"' appears at the bottom.
The background is plain white.

ocr: "Rada Cutlery gifts are enjoyed for a lifetime!"
spatial: The layout is split vertically. The left side features the brand logo, a product image of a knife, and a slogan banner. The right side contains a bulleted list of text. A final quote spans the bottom width of the frame.
